channel.title: Flect
channel.description: Flect is a hand-built Astro documentation template with sidebar navigation, instant search, dark mode, and optional terminal-cast demos — no framework lock-in.

item.title: Five things to change before you ship
item.description: A short checklist for making a freshly cloned Flect site look like yours instead of the demo, in roughly the order you'll actually hit them.

item.title: Why Flect doesn't use a docs framework
item.description: Starlight is good software. Here's why Flect deliberately doesn't build on it, or on anything like it, and what that trade-off actually costs you.

item.title: Announcing Flect
item.description: A lightweight, fully hand-built Astro documentation template with no framework underneath it — sidebar navigation, instant search, and dark mode, all in plain Astro you own outright.
